function.name: euler_1d
function.description: Conduct a 1D Euler PDE simulation and evaluate its CFL convergence. It returns {"Linf_Norm": float, "RMSE": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int, "metrics1": object, "metrics2": object}.
